textByHash.84b5c36f09985c0dda46518cd74153b479c2fe4b: That's right! Made the mistake of sticking my nose where I shouldn't have. Now I've got myself a lovely little cell and no way to get out of it.
textByHash.a944ac6cb99912c90b2628f75c88ccf6b20f77aa: Well, I tell you what, now that you're here, maybe we have a chance to escape!
textByHash.514488d0307b892181c729bd79244e2fae75c849: No idea, but I'm sure we can come up with something. Anything in your cell that you reckon could be of use?
textByHash.acadb237a34d44e11664700017a0d8c3252c3e19: Keep at it. There must be something we can use.
textByHash.c11c80f1d1ca36690702607e271839d25fa755e1: Well read it and see what it says!
textByHash.777f164df43c7cb69ee6aad88b720a0f61aaf109: Brilliant! Keep looking and see what else you can find.
textByHash.e782224a6fb0038b9272cb40c7998ab945ed7946: Oh, pass it through! I reckon I can make use of it.
textByHash.a4999856d1cb5384d1179ae46c46bfe3f4744ba5: Okay, I have something! See if you can find a use for this.
textByHash.63138be11257bec0743de5c3ce41a1ad05a163fe: Oh, I'm pretty good with those! Pass it through and I'll see if I can get my cell unlocked. Once I'm out, I can free you as well!
textByHash.f36afffc629f26ddce4c8b617437c3a5e96348b2: The Frostenhorn has the ability to amplify power to potentially unimaginable levels.
textByHash.a3f6c0db12399154f54a482398bc12f02d627c4a: Its rediscovery would be revolutionary, but there's just one problem...
textByHash.df2e578f5be9d56ee2d2a3e7aaf1b0a9cda53350: His name is Galvek. In our tongue, it means...
textByHash.e2e65e98ca3edb186e5a6c20a2654d63c16a5291: Who are you and what do you want?
textByHash.ce3e1adbdec65c04c4a22b56fede7e8ddcc76b1f: Psst... Hey... Who's Roald? Who's Drezel?
textByHash.1609f7c695f14cb2bbe0fbdbdfcf750c06e04980: Hey, you deal with this okay.
textByHash.fa5e22aebc901b676d3c30849c02b5a4e5919379: He's just coming! Wait a second!
textByHash.005db55d96810a7e6c53bd5d74ea1ec7a32fef59: What next door? What's coffee? Who ARE you?
textByHash.51bf5af26dc06c3170c57e2c7b03d6eea2d28ca7: Pssst... Hey... Is this place of historic interest?
textByHash.9723aadb60a20a04d9fc4b3afacf80f94975dab3: Clear off! You can't come in!
textByHash.94f98a518ccceaab8b0bf97875a8300046827d84: Psst... Are there any pipes in here, you reckon?
textByHash.9005c8a9d35175c3b04e2cb7467213d46ea1cf70: We don't have any thanks! Bye!
textByHash.c43e335fe75ab87937c264251def226b13c943af: Rickard! Turn away! Don't do this!
textByHash.8e5b116fc44eba68bcc624298c79c3c3d1a499e1: The power of the gods could be yours...
